nasb.text: It continued to Azmon and proceeded to the brook of Egypt, and the border ended at the sea. This shall be your south border.

esv.text: passes along to Azmon, goes out by the Brook of Egypt, and comes to its end at the sea. This shall be your south boundary.

cnv.text: 經過押們，伸展到埃及河，疆界直通到海；這就是他們南方的疆界。

ccb.text: 押们、埃及小河，直到地中海岸。
